text:
Last week I went to the lake. It's a cute little place not too far. There are rocks everywhere. Lots of ducks. I liked it.

I build a snowman.

He had a big carrot for a head. I named him Chuck. I didn't winter-proof him. Maybe next year.

I made ice cream cones. They weren't too fun.

I sat on a log. Everything else was boring.

A hawk flew over. He saw me.

I wasn't scared. He went away. I looked at my hands. They're cold.

I threw snowballs. They stuck.

I left. I think I'd like another tomorrow.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
